title: Greek-Style Freekeh Bowl
description: A hearty and flavorful bowl filled with the nutty taste of freekeh, the crunch of fresh vegetables, and the tang of a Greek yogurt sauce.
instructions: 1. In a medium saucepan, bring 2 cups of water to a boil.
2. Add 1 cup of freekeh and reduce heat to low. Simmer for 20 minutes or until tender.
3. While freekeh cooks, mix together Greek yogurt and lemon juice in a small bowl.
4. In a large bowl, combine cooked freekeh, yogurt sauce, chopped tomatoes, olives, and parsley.
5. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
6. Serve warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
